name: Complexity scaling — DEEP (10 experiments) WITH breadcrumbs
hypothesis: At deep optimization (10 experiments), breadcrumbs provide increasing value as the agent can no longer trivially cross-reference all past decisions from the ledger alone.

stimulus.system_prompt: You are resuming an autoresearch session to optimize string_pipeline.py for minimum latency.
stimulus.user_prompt: Resume the autoresearch session. Read autoresearch.md and .autoresearch/results.jsonl. Then read string_pipeline.py. Propose the next 3 experiments. For each: hypothesis, planned change, why it should help, predicted improvement.

pass_criteria.analysis_note: If effect_size(07 vs 07b) > effect_size(06 vs 06b), the scaling hypothesis is confirmed: breadcrumbs matter MORE as depth increases.
